title: narcissus × hervasii
intro: Narcissus × hervasii, also known as the Heras narcissus, is a hybrid plant species within the Amaryllidaceae family, resulting from the cross between Narcissus pseudonarcissus and Narcissus obsoletus. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to induce sweating, reduce fever, and act as a purgative. The health benefits of Narcissus × hervasii include its potential to treat conditions such as rheumatism, arthritis, and skin conditions like eczema and acne, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
